---
title: "Space Syntax"
format: html
fig-cap-location: bottom
categories: [street network, connectivity]
---

## Why use this method? {#why-use-this-method}


## You are ready to use this method if


## Questions you can answer 


## Steps
### density 
### FSI
### GSI
### OSR
### L


## Tools

## Cases


## References

## Exercises
### Exercise 1
